title: Israeli Airstrike Near Mosque in Gaza Kills Five, Including Three Children
detail: An Israeli airstrike near a mosque in Gaza killed five Palestinians, including three children, on April 23, 2026. The strike is the latest in ongoing Israeli military operations across the Gaza Strip. The deaths add to the mounting civilian toll amid continued military activity following the October 2025 ceasefire framework.

media.caption: Israeli airstrike near mosque in Gaza kills five Palestinians including three children
